dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Good morning, Sam! Are you ready for art class today?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Yes! I'm excited. We have to draw something special for Mrs. Chen's anniversary, right?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's right. She's been our teacher for twenty years. It's a special occasion.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I want to draw a picture of her garden. She grows tomatoes and other plants at home.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That's a good idea! I'm going to draw the school building with sunlight coming through the windows.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Perfect! Can you help me prepare the paints? They're on the desk near the window.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Sure. Oh, look! Someone wrote a message on the board. It says 'That was an excellent class yesterday.'

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Mrs. Chen is the best. Every student in our class thinks so.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Okay, I'm starting now. I'll draw the windows first, then the door.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I'm working on the tomato plants. They need proper sunlight to grow, so I'm drawing them in the sun.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: That looks really good! Can you pass me the green paint, please?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Here you go. Oh no! I dropped the bottle!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Quickly! Get some paper! The paint is going everywhere!

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry! It's all over your picture. What will happen now?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: My drawing is ruined. This is wrong. We don't have time to start again.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: I feel terrible. I suffered a loss too - my picture has paint on it. The class starts in just fifteen minutes.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Wait. Perhaps we can do something different. We can work together on one picture.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: What do you mean? How will that work?

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Look - the green paint made an interesting shape. It looks like a road or a path.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: You're right! We can draw Mrs. Chen's garden with a path leading to the school. It connects her home and her work!

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Exactly! I'll draw the school on this side, and you draw the garden on that side. The green paint is the road between them.

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: That's an excellent idea! We can write a message under the picture too.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Yes! 'Thank you for growing our minds and sharing your knowledge.' What's your opinion?

dialogue.speaker: Sam
dialogue.text: Perfect! I'm so happy this happened. Our mistake became something special.

dialogue.speaker: Alex
dialogue.text: Me too. Sometimes the best things happen when we don't plan them. Now let's finish quickly!
